items.title: '60fps Feels Like a Bridge Too far' — Tech Experts Cast Doubt on Those GTA 6 Quality and Performance Mode 'Leaks'
items.summary: You might have seen reports doing the rounds that GTA 6 will come with a mode that lets you play it at 60 frames per second, based on retailer listings that have emerged online. Well, like so many things around Rockstar’s upcoming gaming behemoth, do not believe everything you read.

items.title: GTA 6 Seeing “Record” Orders On Xbox, Microsoft Claims
items.summary: Microsoft has responded to a report regarding GTA 6 preorders and the apparent gulf between Xbox and PlayStation numbers, saying this early, unofficial third-party information "doesn't represent preorder data." "We’ve had record orders. People should wait for real data and not clicks on affiliate links," Microsoft s…

items.title: GTA 6 Won’t Be On A Disc, Not At Launch Or Months After, Report Says
items.summary: Even though Rockstar and Take-Two have already said GTA 6 is a digital-only game , some have held out hope for a disc-based version. items.title: Claims GTA 6 is selling 8 times as many copies on PS5 as Xbox "doesn't represent pre-order data", insists Microsoft
items.summary: Microsoft has refuted claims that its rival system, the PlayStation 5, is outselling the Xbox edition of Grand Theft Auto 6 , claiming that the figure "doesn't represent pre-order data" and insisting "we've had record orders". Read more

items.title: GTA 6 takes aim at TikTok with a new social network where we'll apparently be able to follow influencers, get side missions, and maybe get famous?

items.title: A proper physical edition of Grand Theft Auto 6 will arrive before the year's end, insider claims
items.summary: The same insider who claimed in February that Grand Theft Auto 6 wouldn't launch with a physical version - which turned out to be almost correct - has now claimed a proper physical edition with a disc will launch in December. Read more
